## Checks

- [ ] `pnpm -r build && pnpm -r test && pnpm -r typecheck` passes locally
- [ ] Relevant package READMEs updated if public surface changed
- [ ] Tests added where behavior is testable without the full stack
- [ ] No new dependencies on private or non-public registries

<!-- Context reviewers might want: trade-offs considered, related issues, follow-ups. -->
